raw_consumer_statement: I was victom of a XXXX scam in late XXXX, and submitted a dispute of nearly $ XXXX to barclays bank. My dispute was closed immediately, with a letter sent to me stating it was essentially auto-closed because " service was provided '' although the property I rented was not at all what was advertised. I put together a detailed packet of information, and sent it to Barclays within 30 days to re-open the case. They closed the case again stating I did not send my followup documentation within 20 days. This arbitrary 20 day time limit was not disclosed in the initial letter, nor can I find it anywhere in my account documentation. The scammer is walking away with nearly $ XXXX, will continue to scam other customers, and Barclay Bank is doing nothing to stop it.
